seo.default_title: Elctro — Order food online with live delivery updates
seo.default_description: Browse the menu, checkout securely, and track your order from kitchen to door.
seo.home_description: Order from our menu of quality dishes with clear pricing, secure checkout, and live order tracking.
seo.menu_description: Explore categories, compare dishes, and add items to your cart.
seo.cart_description: Review items and quantities before checkout.
seo.checkout_description: Enter delivery details and confirm your order.
seo.orders_description: Track order status, totals, and line items.
seo.login_description: Access your account to place orders and track deliveries.
seo.register_description: Join to save addresses and get order updates.
seo.jsonld_description: Online food ordering with live order updates from checkout to delivery.

home.hero_description: Order from our wide selection of fresh, high-quality meals and get them delivered right to your door.
home.featured_subtitle: Customer favourites from our kitchen — tap through to the full menu anytime.
home.carousel_subtitle: Swipe through real dishes — auto-play so you always see something delicious.
home.categories_subtitle: Jump straight into burgers, sides, drinks, and more.
home.value_subtitle: Quality ingredients, clear pricing, and updates you can trust from checkout to your doorstep.
home.how_subtitle: Three simple steps from craving to delivery.
home.step1_desc: Filter by category, compare prices, and add items to your cart in seconds.
home.step2_desc: Enter your address, choose payment, and confirm — we keep your details protected.
home.step3_desc: Watch your order status update live. We notify you when it is on the way.
home.cta_band_desc: Open the menu, build your meal, and we will handle the rest.

fast.title: Fast delivery
fast.desc: Optimized routes and handoffs so your food arrives hot when you need it.

safe.title: Secure checkout
safe.desc: Modern auth, encrypted sessions, and clear receipts for every order.

track.title: Live updates
track.desc: See status changes in real time from the kitchen to your door.

cart.title: Your Cart
cart.empty_heading: Your cart is ready for something tasty
cart.empty_subtitle: Explore the menu, tap add to cart, and your bag updates instantly — same session, no refresh.
cart.empty_footer: Prices and quantities stay in sync as you shop. You can review everything here before checkout.
cart.summary_hint: Review items and quantities before you continue.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.success_message: Your order #{id} has been placed successfully.
checkout.guest_subtitle: We use your account to save your delivery address, confirm payment, and send order updates. Your cart stays exactly as you left it.
checkout.guest_empty_carousel: Browse the menu to see dishes — then sign in to pay.
checkout.guest_footnote: Secure checkout after sign-in. New here? Create a free account in under a minute.
checkout.phone_invalid: Enter a valid phone number (at least 5 characters).
checkout.location_link_hint: If you paste a maps link, map pin below is ignored.
checkout.map_hint: Tap the map to drop a pin — drag to adjust. Or use a link above instead.
checkout.location_required: Choose a location on the map or paste a maps link.
checkout.invalid_location_url: Location link must be a valid URL.
checkout.order_failed: Could not place order. Please try again.

orders.title: My orders
orders.subtitle: Track status, totals, and line items for every order in one place.
orders.login_subtitle: We show your personal order history only when you are logged in.
orders.empty_heading: No orders yet — your table is ready
orders.empty_subtitle: Pick something from the menu, check out once, and your deliveries will show up here with live status updates.
orders.empty_footer: After your first order, you can expand any row to see items, address, and totals.
orders.no_orders: You have not placed any orders yet. Start with something delicious from the menu.

account.meta_description: Update your display name and manage browser push notifications for orders.
account.title: Account settings
account.subtitle: Update your profile and manage order notifications on this device.
account.login_required: Please sign in to manage your account.
account.profile_section_desc: Your name appears on receipts and order updates.
account.name: Display name
account.push_section_desc: Get device notifications for new orders (admins) or when your order status changes.

account.push_unsupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.
account.push_denied_hint: Enable notifications for this site in your browser settings, then try again.
account.push_unavailable: The server is not configured for push yet.
account.push_active_hint: This browser is subscribed. Disable to stop alerts on this device only.

admin.subtitle: Manage catalog, orders, and revenue.

admin.page_desc_categories: Create and organize menu categories before adding products.
admin.page_desc_products: Add dishes, prices, and images shown on the storefront.
admin.page_desc_orders: Fulfillment pipeline, line items, delivery details, and status updates.
admin.order_no_items: No line items on this order.
admin.order_cancelled_notice: This order was cancelled. No further fulfillment steps apply.
admin.orders_empty_desc: When customers check out, orders appear here with full line items and tracking.
admin.orders_search_placeholder: Search by order #, customer, email, or product…
admin.page_desc_users: Search accounts, review order counts, and assign admin or customer roles.

admin.users_search_placeholder: Search by name, email, or ID…
admin.users_cannot_demote_self: You cannot remove your own admin access here.
admin.create_category_hint: Slug must be lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens (e.g. burgers).
admin.image_optional: Optional — must be a valid URL
admin.no_categories: No categories yet. Create one first.
admin.chart_orders_by_status_desc: Share of orders in each fulfillment state.
admin.chart_section_analytics_desc: Status mix, payments, volume, and daily performance.
admin.chart_revenue_by_day_desc: Gross order totals per day (all statuses).
admin.chart_orders_per_day_desc: How many orders were placed each day.
admin.chart_cumulative_revenue_desc: Running sum of daily gross totals in the window.
admin.chart_empty_hint: Orders will populate these charts automatically after checkout.
admin.overview_quick_actions_desc: Jump to the tools you use most — no hunting in the sidebar.
admin.qa_create_category_first: Add at least one category before creating products.
admin.chart_revenue_by_day: Revenue by day (last 14 days with activity)
admin.chart_empty: Charts appear once you have orders.

footer.tagline: Order fresh meals online with live updates from checkout to your door.

about.title: About Elctro
about.lead: We are a modern food ordering experience focused on speed, clarity, and reliability.
about.body:
Elctro connects hungry customers with a curated menu of dishes prepared with care. Our platform is designed to make browsing, checkout, and order tracking simple on every device.

Whether you are ordering lunch for the office or dinner for the family, we aim to keep you informed at every step—from confirmation to preparation and delivery.

This page describes our product vision. For data handling and your rights, please read our Privacy Policy. For rules of use, see Terms & Conditions.

privacy.meta_description: How Elctro collects, uses, and stores your data — cookies, orders, and your rights in plain language.
privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.updated: Last updated: 2026. This summary is provided for transparency; adapt with your legal counsel for production.
privacy.body:
We collect information you provide when you create an account, place an order, or contact us—such as your name, email, delivery address, and payment preferences where applicable.

We use this information to operate the service: authenticate you, process orders, send transactional updates, and improve reliability and security.

We store session tokens in secure cookies where needed for authentication. We do not sell your personal data to third parties for marketing.

You may request access or deletion of your account data where applicable by contacting support. We may update this policy from time to time; the “last updated” date will change accordingly.

terms.meta_description: Rules for using Elctro: orders, pricing, acceptable use, and service limitations.
terms.title: Terms & conditions
terms.updated: Last updated: 2026. Replace with counsel-approved terms before launch.
terms.body:
By using Elctro you agree to follow these terms and any policies referenced here.

You must provide accurate delivery information. Prices and availability are shown at checkout and may change as the menu is updated.

Orders are binding once confirmed. Cancellations or refunds follow the rules shown at checkout and any applicable consumer law.

You agree not to misuse the platform (including attempting to disrupt service, scrape data without permission, or access accounts that are not yours).

We provide the service “as is” to the extent permitted by law and may modify features or these terms with reasonable notice where required.
